problem id: 41beb86c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00011111 -> 01111100
  11001001 -> 00100010
  11011100 -> 01110110
  00110011 -> 11001101
  01000010 -> 00001010
  11010011 -> 01001010
  00100110 -> 10011001
  10110011 -> 11001001

query: 10010101
predicted answer: 01010000
